name: resolve-explicit-bundle-url
description: A descriptor with an explicit full `bundleUrl` — the escape hatch for wrappers shipped via a non-registry CDN (esm.sh, jsdelivr, …). The resolver MUST use `bundleUrl` verbatim and MUST NOT auto-synthesize a `styleUrl`: an operator who escape-hatched the bundle declares `styleUrl` themselves, and a synthesized `registry.ggui.ai/.../style.css` would 404 and pollute the iframe CSP `style-src`.
